query:
INSERT INTO courses (code, title, description, colorTheme, totalLessons, displayOrder, cpdHours, price, courseType, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
('BIB103', 'Biblical Hermeneutics', 'This foundational course introduces students to the principles and methods of biblical interpretation. Students will learn to read Scripture in its historical, literary, and theological contexts, applying sound hermeneutical principles to understand the original meaning of biblical texts and their contemporary application. The course covers the history of interpretation, literary genres, grammatical-historical method, and the role of the Holy Spirit in illumination. Students will develop skills for faithful exegesis that honors the authority of Scripture and equips them for effective teaching and preaching ministry.', 'purple', 10, 3, 30, 89, 'theological', NOW(), NOW());

('BIB103', 'Biblical Hermeneutics', 'This foundational course introduces students to the principles and methods of biblical interpretation. Students will learn to read Scripture in its historical, literary, and theological contexts, applying sound hermeneutical principles to understand the original meaning of biblical texts and their contemporary application. The course covers the history of interpretation, literary genres, grammatical-historical method, and the role of the Holy Spirit in illumination. Students will develop skills for faithful exegesis that honors the authority of Scripture and equips them for effective teaching and preaching ministry.', 'purple', 10, 3, 30, 89, 'theological', NOW(), NOW());
